真金白銀 同非洲當地酋長買㗎嘛


How did an African become a slave? At first, white slave traders simply went on kidnapping raids, but this proved too dangerous for the Europeans. Instead, they established hundreds of forts and trading stations along Africa’s West Coast. Local African rulers and black merchants delivered captured people to these trading posts to sell as slaves to European ship captains.

About 50 percent of the slaves were taken as prisoners during the frequent tribal wars occurring among the West African kingdoms. Another 30 percent became slaves as punishment for crimes or indebtedness. The remainder were kidnapped by black slave traders.

http://www.crf-usa.org/black-history-month/the-slave-trade

南方有黑人參軍？

因為北部勞動力唔夠,而當時南部多黑奴.啲資本家想多啲人幫佢手做嘢 ,而啲白人藍領驚畀黑人搶佢飯碗就演變成美國內戰,當時南軍都有部分黑人驚自由之後冇飯食所以同幫南方軍打北方軍.
利申 唔知講得啱唔啱 同講到1999

Google到
The Confederate Army did not allow many blacks to participate in the Civil War as soldiers. White Southerners were concerned that if slaves had access to firearms, the blacks would turn against them and use those firearms to kill whites.[6]

Once the South could see that it was in danger of losing the war, the Confederacy created the "Confederate States Colored Troops" to add more regiments to their army. On March 13, 1865, legislation was finally passed that would free black slaves if they enlisted in the Confederate Army, although they had to have consent from their masters. Only a handful of black soldiers, probably fewer than 50, enlisted because of this legislation and were still in training when the war ended.

https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Slaves_and_the_American_Civil_War
